explanation: Từ vựng: Thư viện "cung cấp" không gian học tập.
question: The library ______ quiet study spaces for students to read books.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Giới từ "on" được dùng cho các thứ trong tuần và buổi của một ngày cụ thể, ví dụ "Monday morning".
question: My teacher told us we would have a meeting ______ Monday morning.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Thì quá khứ tiếp diễn diễn tả một hành động đang xảy ra trong quá khứ ("was doing") thì có một hành động khác xen vào ("rang").
question: When the phone rang, I ______ my homework.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh hơn đối với tính từ dài "difficult" đi kèm với "than".
question: The math exercises in the new textbook are ______ than those in the old one.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 1: Mệnh đề "If" sử dụng thì hiện tại đơn, chủ ngữ "you" đi với động từ nguyên mẫu.
question: If you ______ in the sun for a long time, you will have a sunburn.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Đại từ quan hệ "who" chỉ người, làm chủ ngữ thay thế cho "the person" ngay phía trước.
question: My father is the person ______ loves my family most.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cụm động từ "turn off" mang nghĩa là tắt các thiết bị như đèn và quạt.
question: Before leaving the hall, please ______ all the lights and fans.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Từ vựng: "Protect" mang nghĩa là bảo vệ rừng và môi trường.
question: Everyone should ______ forests and environment.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Liên từ "although" diễn tả sự nhượng bộ, mang nghĩa "mặc dù": Họ vẫn tiếp tục chơi mặc dù trời bắt đầu mưa.
question: They continued playing ______ it started to rain.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Thì quá khứ hoàn thành ('had left') diễn tả hành động xảy ra trước một thời điểm hoặc hành động khác trong quá khứ.
question: By the time we arrived at the station, the train ______.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 2 dùng để đưa ra lời khuyên, động từ to-be luôn dùng 'were' cho mọi ngôi.
question: If I ______ you, I would study harder for the final exam.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Đại từ quan hệ 'whose' được dùng để chỉ sự sở hữu (chiếc xe của người đàn ông).
question: The man ______ car was stolen yesterday reported it to the police.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cụm động từ 'put off' mang nghĩa là trì hoãn (hoãn lại).
question: They decided to ______ the meeting until next week due to the severe storm.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Giới từ 'Despite' + cụm danh từ mang nghĩa nhượng bộ (Mặc dù).
question: ______ the heavy rain, they still went hiking in the mountains.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'look forward to' + V-ing mang nghĩa là mong đợi, háo hức làm điều gì đó.
question: She is really looking forward ______ her grandparents this weekend.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh kép 'The + so sánh hơn..., the + so sánh hơn...' (Càng... càng...).
question: The harder you practice, ______ you will perform on the stage.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'be used to + V-ing' diễn tả việc quen với một hành động nào đó.
question: I am not used ______ up so early in the cold morning.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc bàng thái cách (Subjunctive) với 'recommend that + S + V-nguyên mẫu'.
question: It is highly recommended that she ______ a doctor immediately.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Dùng 'much' (hoặc far, a lot) trước cấu trúc so sánh hơn để nhấn mạnh mức độ.
question: The new software is ______ more complicated than the old version.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Trong câu tường thuật, lùi thì từ quá khứ đơn (last night) sang quá khứ hoàn thành.
question: She asked me where I ______ the previous night.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Liên từ 'Because' chỉ nguyên nhân (Bởi vì học cả đêm nên anh ấy mới ngủ gật).
question: ______ he had studied all night, he fell asleep during the math test.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Động từ 'avoid' (tránh) luôn đi kèm với V-ing.
question: He usually avoids ______ eye contact when he is nervous talking to strangers.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ với 'Rarely' đứng đầu câu, cần đảo trợ động từ hoặc to-be lên trước chủ ngữ.
question: Rarely ______ late for work since she was promoted.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo 'had better + V-nguyên mẫu' (tốt hơn hết là nên làm gì).
question: You had better ______ an umbrella because it looks like it's going to rain.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Câu bị động với động từ khiếm khuyết: 'modal verb + be + V3/ed'.
question: The final project must ______ by the end of this month.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'apologize for + V-ing' mang nghĩa xin lỗi vì đã làm gì.
question: He formally apologized ______ arriving late to the international conference.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Đảo ngữ với 'Not only... but also', mệnh đề đầu tiên mượn trợ động từ đảo lên trước chủ ngữ.
question: Not only ______ beautifully, but she also plays the piano very well.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Tính từ 'interested' đi kèm với giới từ 'in' (thích thú, quan tâm).
question: My brother is strictly interested ______ learning multiple foreign languages.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Trạng từ quan hệ 'where' thay thế cho nơi chốn (tương đương in which).
question: The house ______ we lived for ten years has just been sold.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 3 diễn tả sự việc trái ngược với quá khứ (If + quá khứ hoàn thành, S + would have + V3/ed).
question: If they had departed earlier, they ______ the morning flight.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: trật tự từ sau từ để hỏi ('where') trở về dạng chủ ngữ + động từ bình thường.
question: Could you tell me ______?
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Câu hỏi đuôi của câu rủ rê bắt đầu bằng 'Let's' luôn là 'shall we'.
question: Let's go to the new cinema downtown tonight, ______?
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Động từ 'suggest + V-ing' dùng để đưa ra một đề xuất cùng làm gì.
question: She suggested ______ by train to reduce carbon emissions.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc bị động nhờ vả: 'have something + V3/ed' (nhờ ai đó làm gì cho mình).
question: We will have our car ______ tomorrow before starting our road trip.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'as if' diễn tả một giả định không có thật, luôn dùng 'were' thay cho 'was'.
question: He acts as if he ______ the director of the entire company.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Tính từ 'growing' ở dạng hiện tại phân từ mang nghĩa 'đang gia tăng' để bổ nghĩa cho 'demand'.
question: There is a ______ demand for organic and healthy food nowadays.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ sau the first/ the second/ the last... bằng 'to-V'.
question: Mary was the last person ______ the classroom yesterday afternoon.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'It is no use + V-ing' có nghĩa là 'thật vô ích khi làm gì đó'.
question: It’s no use ______ to persuade him; he has already made up his mind.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'accuse someone of something / V-ing' (buộc tội ai về việc gì).
question: The manager accused the accountant ______ leaking confidential information.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Dấu hiệu 'By this time + thời gian ở tương lai' dùng cho thì Tương lai hoàn thành.
question: By this time next year, I ______ my master's degree in economics.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Động từ 'remember + to-V' diễn tả việc 'nhớ phải làm gì' (chưa xảy ra).
question: Please remember ______ the front door when you leave the house.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh kép với tính từ ngắn (the + short-adj-er + S + V).
question: The more books you read, ______ your vocabulary becomes.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ 'Scarcely/Hardly + had + S + V3/ed + when + S + V2/ed' (Vừa mới... thì).
question: Scarcely had I stepped out of the house ______ it started pouring.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Động từ 'compliment someone on something' (khen ngợi ai về điều gì).
question: The teacher complimented her ______ her excellent presentation skills.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'In spite of + V-ing' dùng để chỉ sự nhượng bộ (Mặc dù).
question: ______ having a lot of money, he is not truly happy with his life.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cụm động từ 'cut down on' mang ý nghĩa là cắt giảm, làm giảm bớt.
question: The local authorities are taking steps to cut ______ on air pollution.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'would rather + S + V-quá khứ' diễn tả mong muốn ai đó làm gì ở hiện tại.
question: I'd rather you ______ your shoes off before entering the living room.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Đảo ngữ với 'Only after + mệnh đề', mệnh đề chính phải đảo trợ động từ lên trước chủ ngữ.
question: Only after they had finished the hard work ______ to realize the mistake.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'Do/Would you mind + V-ing' (Bạn có phiền làm việc gì đó không).
question: Do you mind ______ me a hand with these heavy wooden boxes?
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cụm từ 'due to + Noun phrase' mang nghĩa chỉ nguyên nhân (Bởi vì).
question: The international flight was heavily delayed ______ thick fog.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Động từ 'congratulate someone on V-ing/something' (chúc mừng ai vì chuyện gì).
question: She congratulated me ______ passing the university entrance exams.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ 'No sooner + had + S + V3/ed + than + S + V2/ed'.
question: ______ had we arrived at the beach than it started to rain heavily.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc giả định 'It is essential that + S + (should) + V-nguyên mẫu'.
question: It is essential that every student ______ the strict school rules.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cụm động từ 'look up' mang nghĩa tra cứu (từ điển, thông tin).
question: If you don't know what this complicated word means, look it ______ in the dictionary.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'object to + V-ing' mang nghĩa là phản đối việc làm gì.
question: My friend strongly objected ______ working on weekends without extra pay.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'must have + V3/ed' thể hiện sự suy luận logic chắc chắn trong quá khứ.
question: He didn't even notice me when he walked passed. He ______ deep in thought.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: 'Despite + V-ing' diễn tả sự tương phản (Mặc dù làm việc chăm chỉ, cô ấy vẫn tràn trề năng lượng).
question: ______ working hard all day, she still felt incredibly energetic in the evening.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Đại từ quan hệ 'which' thay thế cho danh từ chỉ vật đóng vai trò làm tân ngữ.
question: The modern car ______ I bought last year has broken down twice already.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Cụm động từ 'hand in' có nghĩa là nộp (bài tập, báo cáo).
question: All students are strictly required to hand ______ their final assignments by Friday.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

explanation: Tính từ 'dedicated to' có nghĩa là tận tâm, hết lòng vì cái gì.
question: Jane is very ______ to her current job because it offers great long-term benefits.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.
